item.title:

item.description:

item.title: OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 7min Premier League Darts heads to Rotterdam for Night 11 Watch it live from 18:00 BST Watch

item.title: WPBSAofficial: WPBSA @WPBSAofficial · 10min Today we remember our great friend John Virgo at Sheffield Cathedral with many of snooker's
item.description:
WPBSA @WPBSAofficial · 10min Today we remember our great friend John Virgo at Sheffield Cathedral with many of snooker's all-time stars and current players in attendance to pay their respects.
The service has been organised by 1997 world champion @kendoherty1997 and snooker broadcaster @robwalkertv to give Mostrar más 7 91

item.title: PremierDarts: DartsAnonymous reposteó Premier Darts Official @PremierDarts · 58min BACK IN STOCK You asked… and asked… and asked The
item.description: DartsAnonymous reposteó Premier Darts Official @PremierDarts · 58min BACK IN STOCK You asked… and asked… and asked The @HarrowsDarts Fortis Professional Dartboard has finally arrived One of the most in-demand boards right now If you missed out last time, you already know how this goes… Don’t wait around Secure yours now Mostrar más 1 1 4 915
